rationale: The citing paper uses Dhar and Simonson (2003) for a specific methodological function, not just a background list. In Study 4, the authors explicitly include a no-choice option and justify this as a way to avoid forced-choice response distortions, citing the 2003 paper directly. That prior result materially informs how the citing paper designs and interprets its own choice task structure, even though it is not the central theory of the article.
relation_description: The citing paper applies the methodological insight from Dhar and Simonson (2003) that forced-choice formats can distort observed choices. It uses this to justify adding a no-choice option in its experiments to reduce forced-choice artifacts.
